_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Integrate cyberspace operations planning efforts with domestic and foreign partners.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.418), DG-T-003 (DG, cosine: 0.382).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.556). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [cyberspace, domestic, efforts, foreign, integrate, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.872, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (91.9%). "Integrate cyberspace operations planning efforts with domestic and foreign partn" and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.437 < STS 0.556 (gap -0.119). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [cyberspace, domestic, efforts] and [ability, build, business] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.3%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [cyberspace, domestic, efforts, foreign, integrate, operations]. WIDAI terms: [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery].
